lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. It shows significant wear and damage on both the interior and exterior. There are several major mechanical issues that require repair, and the car is not currently in running condition.

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition and has been maintained to the highest standards. The exterior finish is absolutely flawless, with no chips, scratches, or swirls in the paint. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state, featuring immaculate upholstery and all electronics functioning perfectly. This car has been garage-kept and meticulously serviced, making it an exceptional example for a discerning collector or enthusiast.

This vehicle is an absolute gem and remains in flawless, showroom condition! It has been kept in pristine shape, both inside and out, and drives just as perfectly as the day it was first sold. For a buyer who demands the highest standard, this car is truly top-tier and ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold primarily for parts or as an extensive restoration project for a dedicated hobbyist. The exterior shows significant wear, including pervasive rust on the wheel arches and lower door panels, along with several deep scratches and faded clear coat. Inside, the cabin requires a full overhaul; the upholstery is heavily torn, several interior trim pieces are missing, and the electronics are largely non-functional. Mechanically, the car runs but suffers from a persistent engine knock and a noticeable transmission slip, making it unsafe for regular road use in its current state. The tires are also beyond their usable life. If you are looking for a donor vehicle or a ground-up project, this car provides a complete frame and major components, but it will require substantial investment to return to a drivable condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches. The interior shows light wear on the seats. All mechanical systems are functioning correctly.
Mint condition.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing a premier balance of performance and value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and consistent road performance. The exterior retains its original luster, complemented by a clean, well-preserved interior that reflects diligent ownership. This offering provides an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a high-caliber driving experience and proven reliability.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that still turns heads? This beauty has been well-loved and is in really solid shape, ready for its next big adventure. It runs like a dream and is perfect for your daily commute or those fun weekend getaways. I’ve taken great care of it, and I’m sure you’re going to love driving it as much as I have. Come by and take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. It comes equipped with a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. Recent mechanical service includes a comprehensive VANOS system refresh and proactive rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity. The suspension geometry remains tight, utilizing the factory-spec MacPherson front and multi-link rear configuration. The exterior retains a strong finish with minimal character wear, while the interior features well-preserved Nappa leather. A mechanically robust driver's car ready for the canyon roads.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Runs well. Recent service completed.

This vehicle is a prime example of a well-maintained daily driver that balances performance with everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though you will find a few minor rock chips on the front fascia and small surface scratches consistent with careful highway use. The body panels are straight and the paint remains vibrant. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and has never been smoked in; the premium leather upholstery shows only light natural creasing on the driver’s side bolster, while the carpets and headliner remain in great shape. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the navigation system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is solid, having undergone regular oil changes and a recent brake service. The engine pulls smoothly without hesitation, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the suspension remains tight and responsive over bumps. It sits on a set of high-quality all-season tires with plenty of tread remaining. This is an honest, reliable vehicle that has been cared for and is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, this model offers a seamless blend of reliable performance and sophisticated styling. Each system has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for daily operation and long-term durability. Acquire a vehicle that balances prestige with practical excellence, ready for immediate delivery.

This exceptional vehicle represents a refined balance of performance and value, having been maintained to a high standard of mechanical and cosmetic excellence. Our rigorous inspection process confirms its structural integrity and operational fluidity, making it an ideal acquisition for the sophisticated motorist. Experience the assurance of quality and the prestige of ownership with this distinguished pre-owned offering.

Hey there! 🚗 I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty car! It’s been so reliable for me and is still in really solid shape, perfect for anyone looking for a smooth, dependable ride. It’s been well-loved and well-maintained, so it’s ready to hit the road for its next big adventure. You’re going to love how it handles—come take it for a spin!
Offered is a mechanically sorted E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 power plant with its signature individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS
Used vehicle. Good condition. Runs well. Clean title. No issues.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined blend of performance and comfort. The exterior presents beautifully with a deep, lustrous finish, showing only the minor cosmetic character consistent with careful, regular use. Inside, the cabin remains a clean, smoke-free sanctuary featuring well-preserved upholstery and a fully operational suite of electronic amenities, including the premium sound system and dual-zone climate control. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; the engine delivers smooth power, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a quiet, composed ride. With a complete service history and a recent multi-point inspection, this car is ready to provide its next owner with thousands of worry-free miles. It is a standout example of pride of ownership.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a premier balance of performance and value. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal, this motorcar offers a refined driving experience. Its condition reflects a history of diligent care, making it an ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking quality without compromise.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and sophisticated engineering. This exceptional example has been vetted for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal, ensuring a seamless transition for its next owner. With a proven track record of consistent upkeep, it offers a premium driving experience and represents a superior value proposition for the discerning driver.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she's been such a joy to own! This car is in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained. It drives beautifully and is ready to hit the road with its next owner. If you're looking for a reliable, comfy car that still looks great, this is definitely the one for you! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

This BMW E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of the high-revving S54 platform. The 3.2L inline-six features individual throttle bodies and a recently serviced Vanos system, ensuring precise variable valve timing and linear power delivery up to the 8,000 RPM redline. Power is routed through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a factory limited-slip differential. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including subframe reinforcement and valve clearance adjustments, maintaining the structural integrity and valvetrain tolerances required for spirited driving. The suspension geometry remains tight, offering the communicative feedback synonymous with the M-chassis. A well-maintained driver’s car that prioritizes mechanical excellence and analog engagement.
Reliable daily driver. Clean title. Minor interior wear. Engine runs smooth. Service records included.

Presented in a striking finish, this vehicle has been cared for with an eye for detail. The bodywork is clean and straight, reflecting a life of careful ownership, with only minor cosmetic blemishes typical of a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin is a testament to quality; the upholstery is supple, the electronics are fully functional, and it has been strictly a non-smoker environment. Under the hood, the engine runs flawlessly, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule that includes recent fluid changes and a brake refresh. It handles the road with precision and quiet comfort. This is a turnkey opportunity for a buyer who values mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal in a pre-owned package.

Presenting a vehicle of distinguished character and proven mechanical integrity. This well-maintained example offers a seamless blend of performance and sophisticated aesthetics, reflecting a history of diligent care. It stands as a premier selection for the driver who demands both reliability and a commanding presence on the road.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, it offers dependable performance and a sophisticated driving experience. Each component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and long-term reliability. A definitive choice for those seeking exceptional value without compromising on professional presentation.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been absolute gold. It’s in really great shape and runs like a dream—perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend road trip! I’ve taken such good care of it, so it’s ready to hit the road with a new owner today. Come take it for a spin, you’re going to love how it handles!
Available is a driver-focused Ford Focus RS, featuring the 2.3L EcoBoost inline-four equipped with a twin-scroll turbocharger
Reliable daily driver. Minor cosmetic wear. Service records available. Tires recently replaced. Everything works.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between daily reliability and premium comfort. Meticulously maintained with a full service history, the engine remains responsive and the transmission shifts smoothly, offering a confident driving experience. The interior features high-quality upholstery with only minimal signs of use, and all electronics—including the climate control and infotainment system—are fully operational. While the exterior retains a deep, glossy shine, you may find a few minor stone chips consistent with careful road use. It has been smoke-free and garage-kept, ensuring it remains in solid, dependable shape for its next owner. This is a well-cared-for car that delivers performance and style without the showroom price tag.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Exhibiting a refined balance of performance and long-term reliability, it features a clean aesthetic and fully operational mechanical systems. It stands as a testament to quality engineering, offering an executive-level driving experience at a compelling value proposition.
